label: Bayanin kaya
description: Kayayyaki masu sauƙi suna buƙatar bayani gajere. Abubuwa masu rikitarwa (misali na'urorin lantarki) suna buƙatar ƙarin cikakkun bayanai da ƙayyadaddun bayanai.

label: Shafin hidima
description: Hidimar gida mai sauƙi tana buƙatar ƙarancin kalmomi. Tayin da ya ƙunshi matakai da yawa da tambayoyin abokan ciniki yana buƙatar ƙari.

label: Babban shafi
description: Babban shafin yana jagorantar baƙi zuwa ƙananan shafuka. Saƙo mai bayyana da tsari mai karatu suna sauƙaƙa kewayawa.

label: Shafin sauka
description: Tayin da suka fi tsada suna buƙatar ƙarin bayani da gina amana. Tayin masu sauƙi za su iya zama gajere.

label: Rubutun blog
description: Tsawo ya dogara da rikitarwar batun. Rubutun ya kamata ya amsa tambayoyin mai karatu cikakke kuma a taƙaice.

label: Jagora / koyarwa
description: Cikakken magana kan batu mai bangarori da yawa. Tsawo ya dogara da fadin batun.
